name: Long Lemonade Can 250ml
long_description:
Pimm's was born in London in 1840, when James Pimm created the spirit to aid digestion of oysters. Pimm's went on to be sent to the edges of the empire and was served at Queen Victoria's lunches. Today, you can find Pimm's at Wimbledon, where it's been served for over 50 years. Whether you're planning a picnic or a BBQ, Pimm's is perfect to share with friends and family. The famous No.1 Pimm's Cup, a gin based liqueur is the basis of this ready to drink beverage. Mixed long with lemonade & dry ginger ale, the balanced drink is ready to serve over ice.
  • Pimm's is a classic summer drink. Whether you're watching Wimbledon, hosting a BBQ or having festival fun, sharing a jug of Pimm's makes these moments special.

  • Pimm's No. 1 has a fruity flavour made from a closely guarded recipe.

Enjoy your own Aperitivo moment by sharing an Aperol Spritz with friends, while enjoying a delicious antipasto platter filled with cheese, olives, cured meats and artisan breads. Aperol's perfect blend of 16 ingredients, including bitter orange, rhubarb and an array of botanicals gives Aperol Spritz a unique orange colour and bittersweet taste.

Enjoy your Aperol Spritz Ready To Serve in a large wine glass, poured over ice with an orange wedge.

name: Gravel Track Cab Sauv 750ml
description: BAROSSA VALLEY WINE CO. GRAVEL TRACK CAB SAUV 750ML:EA
long_description:
Senior winemaker Jamie Saint, pursues his passion for the wines of the Barossa through the Barossa Valley Wine Company. He crafts wines of sophistication, each with the perfect balance of elegance, power and grace.

Gravel Track pays tribute to the long gravel and limestone track that winds its way through our historic 60-year-old Farms vineyard.

Brimming with blackcurrant and black cherry nuances and with layers of spice and tobacco on the nose, this is a powerful expression of the variety. Lashings of blackcurrant on the palate are complemented by lengthy, fine grained tannins and hints of cedar oak from twelve months ageing in French oak.
  • The very best expressions of the Barossa Valley

name: Jaraman Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: At release, the wine has a deep blood red colour to the centre with a youthful dark purple hue to the edges. There are intense aromas of dark blackcurrant fruit along with subtle choc-mint and a hint of crushed violets. On the palate, this is show-stopping wine with intense flavours of cassis and blackberry fruit along with violets and mint and attractive premium oak characters. Overall, the wine is well balanced with complex, well-integrated, elegant tannins providing structure and an intense, persistent length to the finish. The wine was matured for up to 14 months in French oak barrels (10% new and remaining in 1 to 2 year old) followed by fining, minimal filtration and then bottling. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a long term under ideal conditions.

name: Pink Moscato 750ml
long_description: Whispers Pink Moscato is rich in red berry aromas along with freshly crushed grapes. These characters follow through to the palate along with a fruitiness that is balanced by acidity and spritz. At this price point it offers incredible value for money. It pairs very well with gelato or with fruits which are tart such as passionfruit or grapefruit. A refreshing choice!

name: Koonunga Hill Cabernet Sauvignon Bvs 750ml
description: PENFOLDS KOONUNGA HILL CABERNET SAUVIGNON BVS 750ML:EA
long_description: The well-regarded Koonunga Hill Cabernet Sauvignon showcases the typical cellar worthiness that all Penfolds wines are renowned for. The wine has excellent structure and length, ready to drink now or gain further complexity with short-term cellaring.

name: Moscato 750ml
long_description: One sniff and you are taken back to the old corner store and the 50c bags of mixed lollies. Tutti fruitti, sherbet, musk sticks, pink blush and more on show in this crowd pleaser that doesn't make you think too hard that finishes with a prick of acidity on the tongue to balance the sweetness.

name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: This Coonawarra cabernet is the pick for a weeknight wine at a great price point. Loads of dark fruits, a decent dollop of spicy oak and impressive length and character here. It's medium bodied and finishes with a firm tannic grip. This deep ruby-red wine is ideal for casual dinners and parties. It's the perfect accompaniment to grilled meats on the BBQ as well as hard cheeses.

name: Barry & Sons' Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: Fresh tobacco leaf aromas, combine with cassis, boysenberry, and spice on the nose. A fine and detailed tannin line, with ripe berry fruit flavours, hints of tobacco and classic Cabernet bramble fruit flavours.

name: Moscato Rose 750ml
long_description: The Brown Brothers Moscato Rosa has a vibrant strawberry pink hue, giving it a light and delicate appearance. Rose petal and red berry aromas along with freshly crushed grapes and a spicy perfume dominate the nose. These characters follow through to the palate along with a fruitiness that is balanced by acidity and spritz. Some retained bubble in the wine from fermentation gives a mild frizzante effect resulting in a lively and fresh wine.

name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description:
After generations spent working the same soils, our growers have learned exactly when to step back and let nature take over. That way, the grapes absorb the natural characters of the earth. You see, our growers have been perfecting this way of doing things, year in year out, on the same lands and with the same sense of patience and dedication. And they'll continue to pass the knowledge along. So, the earthworks story will be a long one, tied to tradition and driven by sustainability. Now, time to crack the lid, lean back and taste the fruits of their perseverance. 

Warm, enticing blueberry aromas frame luxurious mocha chocolate, cedar spice, plums and blackcurrants. Plum and berry compote, roast vanilla and boysenberry with hints of mocha chocolate complement the rich, velvety finish.Homemade saltbush lamb sausage rolls or cherry tomato and tapenade tartlets. 
  • Barossa Cabernet from trusted family growers.

  • Plushness and generosity, accompanied by the warmth of a riper style.

  • A blend of French and American oak to highlight the sweetness of fruit on the palate.

name: Match Made Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: Pepperjack Match Made Cabernet Sauvignon is the perfect match for mid-week meals. Home grown in Langhorne Creek and McLaren Vale, this Cabernet Sauvignon is a vibrant red with delicious aromas of ripe red currants and blackberries, along with hints of sage, mint and tasty oak. The palate shows subtle red fruits, accompanied by some grainy long tannins. Perfect to be enjoyed now with a silky soft cheese or a delicious lamb roast, Match Made Cabernet Sauvignon is a delightful option for any moment - be it a cozy dinner or a casual get-together with friends.

name: 5th Generation Cabernet Merlot 750ml
long_description: The Cabernet Merlot is a classic blend that combines the elegant structure and vibrant fruit characters of Cabernet Sauvignon with the plummy softness of Merlot. The palate is long and elegantly structured with oak and Cabernet tannins, carrying this wine through to a long, flavoursome finish.

name: One Small Step Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: TAYLORS ONE SMALL STEP CABERNET SAUVIGNON 750ML:EA
long_description: Juicy blackcurrant fruits along with subtle coffee and savoury cedar flavours and a smooth gentle finish.

name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description:
Solidly dark, deep, red and purple. An honest hue. Ripe mulberry and blueberry aromatics; a melded gentleness. Some freshly shaved pencil, some older oak, some blackberry as all cabernet must have? Aromas of berries first, then the secondary bouquet wafts - almost unnoticed - in. Soft red berry fruits begin and then a core of more determined blackberries march through, as if straight from the field. Following them rush at some speed a surfing wave of bucolic tannins. They are large, a little rough, but out for a good time. This is broad, long, wide and frying red wine - and it is savoury. A delicate heft. A rich cabernet, yet with Coonawarra unmistakably there.
  • A delicate heft. A rich cabernet, yet with Coonawarra unmistakably there.

name: Estate Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: Zilzie's Cabernet Sauvignon has generous layers of rich dark berry fruits, delicate tannins and an elegant touch of oak. Ideal match to Asian BBQ lamb ribs with hoisin and sweet chilli sauce.

name: Shoulder To Shoulder Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: PETER LEHMANN SHOULDER TO SHOULDER CABERNET SAUVIGNON 750ML:EA
long_description:
Our winemakers believe that truly great wines are made in the vineyard. They work closely with local grape growers to capture the individual essence of each site, to create excellent winesthat express a sense of place.

Our Shoulder to Shoulder wines celebrate the longstanding friendships of our winemakers and grape growers. Sourced from premium Barossa vineyards, this Cabernet Sauvignon has been matured in French and American oak barrels for 14 months. The result is a wine bright in colour displaying classic regional flavour of black forest fruits with earthy undertones. It has a full, round palate in which the soft tannins blend with the concentrated fruit to provide richness and outstanding length. This is a superb wine accompaniment to food, best paired with rich game dishes or roasted beef.

name: One Giant Leap Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: TAYLORS ONE GIANT LEAP CABERNET SAUVIGNON 750ML:EA
long_description: The wine has an aroma of rich blackcurrant, subtle star anise spice and a touch of eucalypt. French oak maturation is also evident with subtle aromas of cedar and chocolate. A wine of great intensity. It has distinctive blackcurrant and cassis fruit flavours. Subtle oak characters of cedar and spice are also evident. The tannins are fine and elegant - a hallmark of the varietal. The palate is well balanced, complex and fulfilling and lingers on the finish.

name: Limestone Coast Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: An iconic red wine from one of the pioneers of Australia's internationally renowned Coonawarra region. It's elegant and graceful with juicy red fruit character and a dusty tannic structure. Notes of cedar and vanilla show off the virtues of aging in French oak. This Cabernet Sauvignon is ready to drink now with meaty dishes and grilled steak, yet it will hold in the cellar for another 10-15 years.

name: Grazier Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: For pan seared or grilled steak, The Grazier hits the mark. This Cabernet Sauvignon offers dark fruit with a touch of spicy oak and fresh mint for a balanced and juicy sip. Tannins are soft enough to enjoy to enjoy this wine in its youth, delivering a juicy and smooth partner for your sirloin or beef tenderloin.

name: E&t Cabernet Merlot 750ml
long_description: Evans & Tate, our wines are crafted to reflect and express their origin. The E&T range of wines are vibrant and flavoursome and expressive of beautiful Western Australia. Aromas of fresh red berries and toast French oak open to a rich and balanced palate, resulting in a ripe and delicious wine. Don't wait, perfect to drink now.

name: Faith Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: St Hallett Faith Cabernet Sauvignon displays aromas of plums, mulberry and fruitcake with a hint of black olive tapenade. Flowing through to the palate is a soft, plush plum and dark cherry wrapped in a silky coating of milk chocolate and coffee bean.

name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: The aroma displays attractive ripe blackcurrant and plum fruit flavours, with bright herbaceous accents as well as subtle cedar and spice notes. The wine is full-bodied, with dark berry flavours, balanced acidity and smoothly structured tannins leading to an elegant and persistent finish.

name: The Siding Cabernet Sauvignon 375ml
long_description: Wynns Coonawarra 'The Siding' Cabernet Sauvignon embodies all characteristics of a great red wine with its gentle tannins and textural finish.

name: Vint Bourbon Barrels Cabernet 750ml
description: ROBERT MONDAVI PRIVATE SELECTION BOURBON CAB SAUV 750ML:EA
long_description:
Deep ruby in colour, this Cabernet Sauvignon opens with rich, concentrated aromas of ripe dark cherry, blackberry, cocoa, and sweet spices. Soft, chewy tannins lead to a long, lush finish. Aging select lots in bourbon whiskey barrels enhances the finish of smoke, sweet spice, and cocoa when added to the final blend. A superb accompaniment to bourbon-glazed grilled meats, charcuterie boards, hearty pasta dishes, and strong cheeses.

  • Aged in Bourbon Barrels

  • Californian Wine

name: Bin 45 Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
long_description: Loved around the world, Lindeman's Bin Series wines are approachable in style and consistent in quality with global appeal. Designed to be enjoyed time and time again, these are wines people simply love to drink. This Lindeman's Bin 45 Cabernet Sauvignon is bursting with classic dark berry and cassis characters with hints of chocolate and mint.

name: One Small Step Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: TAYLORS ONE SMALL STEP CABERNET MERLOT 750ML:EA
long_description: The 20th of July 1969 is a significant date in Taylors history; not only was it the day that astronaut Neil Armstrong took one small step on the surface of the moon, but also the day that Bill Taylor set foot on, what was the become the renowned Taylor family vineyard. While one stepped on the barren lunar surface, the other stepped on rich terra rossa soils with the hope and determination to craft wines to rival the world's best.

description: HARDYS TINTARA MCLAREN VALE CABERNET SAUVIGNON 750ML:EA
long_description: Founded in 1861, Tintara the home of Hardys, remains a testament to quality winemaking, combining age old methods and new technology. The Hardys Tintara Cabernet Sauvignon is intense with blackcurrant and raspberry flavours with oak and seamless tannins. Grapes from McLaren Vale and Margaret River bring beautiful ripe fruit and bright, juicy tannins.

long_description:

TASTES LIKE: Ripe plum and raspberry accompanied by black pepper and aniseed spice, with Savoury notes of dried herbs.

BEST SERVED WITH: Pizza, red meat or rich tomato-based pasta dishes.

Whether you're hosting a dinner party, unwinding with friends, or simply sharing a moment, BOXED IN keeps your wine fresh for up to 6 weeks, so you can keep the good times flowing.

Sophisticated, approachable and full of flavor, BOXED IN is for those who love good wine without the rules.
  • Unbox up to 6 weeks of freshness

  • More than 2.5 bottles of wine inside

name: Tempranillo 750ml
long_description: The most vibrant expression of Tempranillo that shows ripe red fruit charactertistics and a slight vanilla character from four months in American oak.

name: Barossa Valley Grenache 750ml
long_description:
Inspired by James Busby, the forefather of Australian wine. Arriving in Australia with vine cuttings in hand, this icon kick-started a world-class wine culture on Australian soil. Vibrant ruby in colour with raspberry, pomegranate, leather and thyme aromatics. The palate is filled with cherries and redcurrants which are countered by warm brown spices and a subtle herbal character. The tannins are delicate and there is lovely ruby grapefruit acidity.

Awards:
  • Bronze Medal Royal Queensland Wine Awards 2022.

name: Graphite Grenache 750ml
long_description:
Bold, edgy and elegant - the Graphite Series redefines the meaning of every day drinking with its approachable flavours and smooth finish.

Sourced from premium wine regions throughout Australia.

Bright red fruits and a lush medium weight palate make this wine suitable for any occasion.
  • Bold, Edgy and Elegant

  • Any Occasion

name: Estate Grenache 750ml
long_description: At release, the wine is a deep garnet with a vibrant purple hue to the edge. The wine has fresh and vibrant aromas of raspberry jubes, white pepper and blueberry. There are underlying hints of rose petal and baking spices adding to the allure. The wine is medium-bodied with flavours of raspberry and blueberry along with delicious white chocolate characters. The overall texture of this fruit-driven wine is sublimely soft and silky. It is a wonderfully easy to enjoy drop. Eighty five percent of the blend was matured for 8 months in a combination of French and American oak barrels, the remainder was kept in stainless steel to intensify the fruitiness of the wine. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over the short term under ideal conditions.

name: Shoulder To Shoulder Grenache 750ml
description: PETER LEHMANN SHOULDER TO SHOULDER GRENACHE 750ML:EA
long_description:
Our winemakers believe that truly great wines are made in the vineyard. They work closely with local grape
growers to capture the individual essence of each site, to create excellent wines that express a sense of place.
Our Shoulder to Shoulder wines celebrate the longstanding friendships of our winemakers and grape
growers. Sourced from premium Barossa vineyards, this Grenache wine has been matured in French oak
barrels. A medium-bodied fragrant wine revealing flavours of juicy red berries and soft tannins, with subtle
hints of pomegranate, rose and peppery spice. A delicious wine to savour by itself or with a meal.

name: The Quiver Mclaren Vale Grenache 750ml
description: THE GROUP THE QUIVER MCLAREN VALE GRENACHE 750ML:EA
long_description:
Old vines & sandy soil deliver a beautifully balanced Grenache with cherry blossom aromas, fresh berry palate and a long smooth finish.

Crimson red in the glass with juicy and fruit aromas of black currents, red berries and spiced fruit cake on the nose with a pinch of spice. On the palate, this grencahe has generous fruit characters with savoury tannins and spicy, textural characters and a smooth lingering finish. 
  • McLaren Vale appellation

name: Woodfired Grenache 750ml
long_description: Grenache is an ideal red variety from the warm climates of Australia. Woodfired Grenache is grown in Northern Heathcote from family estates as well as two local farmers. The climate and deep red soil produces the perfect red wine to accompany chargrilled cooking and woodfired pizza. Dense Grenache with perfumed red and dark fruits, soft balanced flavours.

name: Grenache 375ml
long_description: A small bottle of wine that is big on flavour and big on doing a drop of good. A brooding colour with notes of dark raspberry, cherry and rosehip on the nose. There is a lovely presence of sweet oak spice to complement the ripe fruits which gives a generous but balanced mouthfeel. There is a great intensity and a lovely blood orange acidity on the finish. By buying this Grenache you've done a drop of good because we are giving 50c from every bottle purchased to Clean Up Australia.

name: Estate Merlot 750ml
long_description: A generous fruit driven wine bursting with juicy black cherries, a lingering hint of dark chocolate and soft silky tannins.

name: Merlot 750ml
long_description:
Soft, velvety, and smooth, [yellow tail] Merlot is an excellent alternative to the heavier and more tannic red varieties.
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!

name: Merlot 750ml
long_description: Come with us & traipse down the vineyards, where the grapes flourish & open spaces evoke what wine drinking should be, free of judgement, full of simple joy. After all, the best things in life are made from grapes! A simply velvety & smooth Merlot. Pretty and round with plum fruit and a good balance of vanilla spice. The perfect partner for your next pizza & pasta night in.

name: Vint Rum Barrel Merlot 750ml
description: ROBERT MONDAVI VINT RUM BARREL MERLOT 750ML:EA
long_description:
Designed to be shared with friends the Private Selection Vint Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot is dark ruby red in colour, and opens up with aromas and flavours of ripe black cherry and raspberry. Aging select lots in rum barrels enhances the notes of baking spice, brown sugar, vanilla, and cocoa when added to the final blend. Dark chocolate notes carry through to a long, lush finish. A superb accompaniment to spiced meats and poultry, brie with fig jam, and chocolate desserts

  • Aged in Rum Barrels

  • Californian Wine

  • Californian Merlot

name: Merlot 750ml
long_description:
Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Created to drink now, our Classic wines are ideal for those who seek excellent value and reliable quality for every day enjoyment. A medium bodied wine with ripe cherry, fresh plum and blueberry fruit flavours enhanced by subtle oak. Enjoy with your favourite pasta or cheeses.
  • May contain traces of the fining agents milk and egg white.

  • Preservative (220) added

name: Merlot 750ml
long_description: The Hawke's Bay wine region is arguably the most exciting find in recent times for the cultivation of Merlot in New Zealand. Spice and berry fruit on the nose, it dishes out a persistent and focused stream of racy cranberry, zesty pie cherry and ripe cranberry flavour melding perfectly with hints of tannin and savoury herbs. It's medium weight, nicely textured and worth your attention. - Blue Gold Medal   Sydney International Wine Competition. 2018 Vintage.

name: The Preacher Merlot 750ml
long_description: Purple-ruby in colour with a bright nose of plum, blackberry, and dried fennel. The palate shows the opulent fruit which is countered by subtle spice and delicate savoury notes. The tannins help temper the fruit and there is a lovely herbal note on the finish. Perfect partner for home-made pizza.

name: Revolution Merlot 750ml
long_description: This lighter bodied Merlot shows real restraint yet is packed with vibrant red berry fruits. Elegant aromatics are nicely rounded with plush fruit, a fine tannin structure as well as fresh acidity tying it all together. Great with slow roasted pork belly.

name: Cienna 750ml
long_description: A sip of Cienna is like tasting summer berries in a glass; filled with fresh ripe cherries and juicy red berries. With a gentle spritz, Cienna is smooth with a refreshing finish. Enjoy chilled.

name: HARDYS BRAVE NEW WORLD SH
description: HARDYS BRAVE NEW WORLD SHIRAZ SANGIOVESE 750ML:EA

name: Residence Montepulciano 750ml
description: BAROSSA VALLEY WINE CO. RESIDENCE MONTEPULCIANO 750ML:EA
long_description:
The Barossa Valley Wine Company has one singular focus. To hand craft the very best expressions of the region. From our spiritual home - the gnarled old Farms Vineyard in the renowned Barossa Valley - we are committed to continuing to build on the Barossa's rich history and heritage.

The Residence pays tribute to the historic cottage on our Farms vineyard, which was one of the earliest properties ever settled in the Barossa. Today the cottage still stands in prime position with an impressive view of our Farms vineyard.

Delicate aromas of red plum and blueberry are complemented by delicate oak spice and a hint of aniseed. A medium-bodied, elegant wine, the palate is vibrant and fruity, with the soft tannins providing a silky yet persistent finish.
  • Emerging varietal

  • Premium wine

  • Limited release

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: Traditional winemaking techniques and an eye to modern styles allow us to create wines that are synonymous with the regions they are from. Rich, honest wines that showcase the regions in their most natural light. Pepperjack Malbec is a deep vibrant red colour with aromas of violets, blueberries, spice and hints of chocolate. The palate is rich and plush with flavours of Satsuma plum, raspberries and red currants with fine silky tannins with balance and finesse.

name: Chianti Docg 750ml
long_description: The Chianti Classico DOCG wine has a deep vinous flavour and a vivid red colour. This red wine displays a bouquet of violet. Dry at first then the palate gradually transitions to smooth velvet. A beautiful wine that is suitable for the entire meal.

name: Franco & Rico Malbec 750ml
long_description: Cherry red in colour with purple hues, you'll encounter aromas of blackberries and cherry, when opening this Franco & Rico Malbec. This wine is full of plum and blueberry flavours with soft undertones of sweet spice on the palate. A great Australian take on an Argentinean classic, we recommend pairing it just like they do in Mendoza- with grilled meats straight off the BBQ or cured meats as an appetizer.

name: Gravel Track Gsm 750ml
description: BAROSSA VALLEY WINE CO. GRAVEL TRACK GSM 750ML:EA
long_description:
The Barossa Valley Wine Company has one singular focus. To hand craft the very best expressions of the region. From our spiritual home - the gnarled old Farms vineyard in the renowned the Barossa Valley - they are committed to continuing to build on the Barossa's rich history and heritage.

Gravel Track pays tribute to the long gravel and limestone track that winds its way through our historic 60-year-old Farms vineyard.

Lifted aromas of red cherry and raspberry complemented by clove and lavender on the nose, with a rich, earthy and vibrant palate. Soft velvety tannins provide a silky yet persistent finish, punctuated with bright redcurrant and blueberry characters and a subtle background of spice from twelve months French oak maturation.
  • The very best expressions of the Barossa Valley

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: Only the best wines make it to the herd. Strong aromas of red fruits and spice, the palate rich with red fruits, plum notes and it finishes smooth tannins and a lingering texture. The Tussock Jumper Malbec is perfect with barbequed lamb or beef with a smoky rub just like the Argentinians like to do it. A casual outdoor party on a cool night is crying out to be had with this excellent value wine. Drink now or cellar in the short term. Enjoy one today!

name: Uprising 750ml
long_description: 19 Crimes turned criminals into colonists. Upon conviction, British rogues, guilty of at least one of the 19 Crimes, were sentenced to live in Australia, rather than death. The Red Blend is full and round on the palate with a distinct sweetness and spice, giving a rich and round mouth feel.

name: Tintara Grenache Shiraz Mataro 750ml
long_description: Founded in 1861, Tintara the home of Hardy's, remains a testament to quality winemaking, combining age old methods and new technology. Our Tintara range reflects Thomas Hardy's mission to create wines that were a true expression of the remarkable McLaren Vale region. The Hardys Tintara GSM expresses the richness of each varietal, combining the perfume and fragrance of Grenache, with rich sweet fruit flesh of Shiraz, underpinned with luscious Mataro. The flavours intermingle to produce a medium bodied wine of intensity.

name: Red Blend 750ml
long_description: One of our best-selling Portuguese red wines here at Liquorland. This dark, structured wine, with its balanced blend of Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca and Tinta Roriz, is firm with tannins and dense berry fruits. Full in the mouth; a concentrated wine that pairs to your classic woodfired pizza or pasta dish.

name: Garnacha 750ml
long_description: Direct from northern Spain, after opening you'll encounter a reddish purple wine with strawberry, raspberry, cherry and blackberry on the nose, enhanced with floral notes of violet and lilac. On the palate, sweet spices and toast enhance and wrap the fruit. Soft, silky and fresh mouth feel that is intensely fruity, with a lasting fruit and fresh finish. Enjoy with roasted vegetables and grilled beef, straight off the BBQ. A great wine for those family dinners.

name: Reframed Shiraz Riesling 750ml
long_description: An accident of history reclaimed Shiraz - with Riesling - reframed These so-called rogue vines Make for fascinating wines Some Riesling cuttings accidentally made their way into our first Shiraz vineyard. Now we're unleashing the rogue on purpose.

name: Tempranillo Shiraz 750mL
long_description: Elefante is a good example of value packed Tempranillo Shiraz you can drink this year without breaking the budget, a vivid red label, stylised bull, and all. The aroma suggests cherries, sarsaparilla, leather and curry leaf, and a satisfying palate offers good depth of ripe, savoury, lingering flavours, seamlessly integrated with ripe tannins.

name: Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz 2023 Gb 750ml
long_description: The structure of Cabernet Sauvignon meets the richness of Shiraz. A benchmark Penfolds wine and one of the most collected wines in Australia. Evocative barrel ferment character, red currant, cranberry, wild cherry, vanilla and exotic spice ensure the wine is true to style. Fine tannins and acidity ensure length and vibrancy. The perfect wine to mark the moment, big or small.

name: Elevation Tempranillo 750ml
long_description:
Nepenthe Elevation is a collection of wines that expresses the fruit and unique characters from this diverse cool climate region.

The Nepenthe Elevation Tempranillo combines wild blueberry with subtle spice and savoury earthiness complemented by elegant complexity and a lingering finish.

  • Crafted in the Adelaide Hills

name: Reserva 750ml
long_description: Ruby-Red colour, bright and deep. The Reserva has an intense nose, with a great balance between the fruit (cherries, black plums, ripe blackberries) and the clean nuances coming from the oak (clove, pepper, vanilla and coconut), enriched by the complex aromas developed during bottle ageing. Very attractive on the palate, with ripe fruit and spices, tobacco and toasted oak. This wine is delicious with red meat, grilled meats such as tuna steak or beef with black pepper, as well as game, and mature and blue cheeses.

name: Grenache 750ml
long_description: Aj Grenache 750mL

name: Barossa Tempranillo 750ml
long_description:
After generations spent working the same soils, our growers have learned exactly when to step back and let nature take over. That way, the grapes absorb the natural characters of the earth. You see, our growers have been perfecting this way of doing things, year in year out, on the same lands and with the same sense of patience and dedication. And they'll continue to pass the knowledge along. So, the earthworks story will be a long one, tied to tradition and driven by sustainability. Now, time to crack the lid, lean back and taste the fruits of their perseverance.

Chocolate and freshly baked dark cherry pie is followed by florals, raspberry and a hint of tarragon. Plush with dark berry fruits and chocolate through the mid-palate, leading to a moreish white pepper, soft tannin finish. Grilled lamb cutlets and smoky eggplant salad or ratatouille with fresh sourdough bread.
  • Wild ferment, vegan and sustainably grown.

  • Juicy and plush Barossa Tempranillo.

  • A small blend of Shiraz is added as a nod to the Barossa Heritage.

name: Tempranillo 750ml
long_description: This wine displays aromas of plums with hints of fruit and red liquorice. The palate is rich and savory with concentrated berry fruits and soft velvety tannins. This wine can be enjoyed now but will also improve with careful cellaring.

name: Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz 2021 750ml
long_description: Red wine lovers exalt the structure of cabernet sauvignon combined with the richness of shiraz in this classic Penfolds release. A balanced wine with dark fruit flavours and integrated tannins. Pair with meaty and savoury meals for a satisfying synergy.Disclaimer: Product may have a cork or screwcap closure

name: Sangiovese 750ml
long_description: Traditional winemaking techniques and an eye to modern styles allow us to create wines that are synonymous with the regions they are from. Rich, honest wines that showcase the regions in their most natural light. Pepperjack Sagiovese is a beautiful red in colour, with aromas of ripe plum, brambles and subtle oak characters. The palate shows fresh fruits of red cherry, cranberries with savoury chalky tannins which give length and finesse

name: Revolution Grenache 750ml
long_description: Children of the Revolution has been hand-crafted for a new generation of wine lovers. The wines are sourced from premium South Australian vineyards to produce soft, fruit-driven wines that are full of fresh, bright fruit flavours whilst being medium bodied, naturally lighter in alcohol and vegan friendly. This Grenache has red forest berries, violet and subtle brown spice aromas that lead to a vibrant and fresh red-fruited palate. This is a versatile wine that is great on its own yet will partner many cuisines.

name: Barossa Grenache 750ml
long_description: A fruit dominated wine displaying lifted blueberry and confectionery sherbet aromas and generous red berry and plum flavours. Subtle oak rounds out the finish. A fruit driven and approachable style made for enjoying young. Sourced from a mix of family owned and grower vineyards throughout central and southern Barossa including long term growers like the Semmler family. Our family owned vineyards are predominantly bush vine grown, including some of the oldest vines in the Barossa.

name: Bordeaux 750ml
long_description: Stylish as ever, Château Latour Camblanes is ruby red in colour; pleasing aromas of juicy fruits develop on the nose alongside fine hints of baking spices. The palate has a lovely velvety feel, with delightful flavours of freshly-picked red berries and notes of cocoa and cardamom. An elegant tannic structure gives finesse and a well-balanced, flavourful finish. A fabulous red for cellaring.

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: 19 Crimes turned criminals into colonists. Upon conviction, British rogues, guilty of at least one of the 19 Crimes, were sentenced to live in Australia, rather than death. This Argentinian Malbec is delicious, filled with dark cherry fruit, soft tannins and a subtle sweetness.

name: Sangiovese 750ml
long_description:
Sangiovese has found its home away from home in Victoria. The gentle climate and unique soils craft elegantly plum fruited wines with Sangiovese's tell-tale savoury characteristics and fresh finish.

Plum and dark cherry fruit are complemented by a slight herbal note. The tannins are elegant and soft and the wine finishes with a vibrant blackcurrant finish.

The perfect partner for pizza or ragu.

name: Reframed Cabernet Sauvignon Cabernet Franc 750ml
description: WYNNS REFRAMED CABERNET SAUVIGNON CABERNET FRANC 750ML:EA
long_description: Cabernet Franc is a lighter, more fragrant version of its better-known child, Cabernet Sauvignon. In this family blend, the perfume and soft tannins of Cab Franc are given a boost of depth and lusciousness by our legendary Coonawarra Cab Sav. A summer red that's more than cosy enough for winter.

name: Pablo & Pedro Tempranillo 750ml
long_description: Australian made but with Spanish heritage evident upon opening, discover delicious aromas of red fruits, blackberries and a touch of spice on the nose. Followed by mouth-watering flavours of strawberries, vanilla, subtle oak and ripe tannins on the palate. Enjoy this juicy Tempranillo with tapas style dishes like croquettes, chorizo and olives or a wood-fired mozzarella pizza. The Pablo & Pedro Tempranillo is a great choice for garden parties on those sunny days.

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: Dark brick red with violet hints at the rim edge. Bucolic and beguiling. Tobacco leaf aromatics that so reassuringly say ‘malbec'. Dusty Mendoza tracks; blackberry and loganberry fruits and canes and foliage; dark fruits and dark ways. There's the bouquet of the coming heat of the day, but the freshness of the dawn's dew. A country wine in its finest clothes. Grip and density and blood and - importantly - an easy structure. It slides through your palate but without missing any of the stops. Honest and giving red wine, wherein the determined malbec dark leafy fruits have the feet of Nike. Swift, sure-footed, and seamlessly striding forever on. Deeply hidden Christmas Pudding flavours. Understated ripeness. Savoury.

name: Residence Tempranillo 750ml
description: BAROSSA VALLEY WINE CO. RESIDENCE TEMPRANILLO 750ML:EA
long_description:
The Barossa Valley Wine Company has one singular focus. To hand craft the very best expressions of the region. From our spiritual home - the gnarled old Farms Vineyard in the renowned Barossa Valley - we are committed to continuing to build on the Barossa's rich history and heritage.

The Residence pays tribute to the historic cottage on our Farms vineyard, which was one of the earliest properties ever settled in the Barossa. Today the cottage still stands in prime position with an impressive view of our Farms vineyard. An earthy and vibrant wine revealing lifted aromas of black cherry, cedar oak and a hint of bay leaf on the nose. Generous and complex, our Tempranillo is a medium-bodied wine with enticing blueberry characters and subtle oak combining to deliver a savoury finish.

  •  Winestate Magazine Emerging Varietals - Awarded 94 points

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: A lightly purpled colour with a nose full of blueberries and violet. The palate shows classic Malbec blue fruits with subtle spice which is complemented by gentle tannins and a soft finish. The wine is perfect for partner for char-grilled steak or roasted vegetables. The Limestone Coast provide the perfect growing conditions for Malbec in Australia. The region has a moderate climate coastal climate with warm days but cool nights. Its unique clays soils create complex, fruit driven wines.

name: Langhe Nebbiolo Doc 750ml
long_description: Deep garnet red with medium highlights. The nose shows cherry and hints of violet together with spicy overtones. The palate is full-bodied with red fruit, and chewy tannins.

name: Tempranillo 750ml
long_description: This Squealing Pig Tempranillo is fantastically drinkable, with verve and minerality. With bright cherry and forest fruits lifting out of the glass, this wine is medium -bodied and bursting with red fruit flavours.

name: Tempranillo 750ml
long_description: Only the best wines make it to the herd. This Tempranillo has the aroma of black wild fruit like blackberry and mulberry. The palate is soft, silky and well balanced with a full lingering finish. best served at room temperature and your favourite pizza.

name: Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz 2022 Gift Box 750ml
description: PENFOLDS BIN 389 CABERNET SHIRAZ 2022 GIFT BOX 750ML:EA
long_description: Red wine lovers exalt the structure of cabernet sauvignon combined with the richness of shiraz in this classic Penfolds release. A balanced wine with dark fruit flavours and integrated tannins. Pair with meaty and savoury meals for a satisfying synergy.

name: Reserve Saint Emilion 750ml
long_description: A deep purple colour with hint of spice and vegetal aromas, it is a blend of 95% merlot, 5% cabernet franc from the d'Origine Protegee appellation in Bordeaux. The palate of the Dulong Reserve Saint Emilion is supple and round with notes of plum, leather and spice with a rich, persistent finish. Have it with grilled meats like pork chops straight from the BBQ to fully bring out the flavours of the wine and dish in unison. Enjoy it today or cellar it for up to seven years.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
A superb Tasmanian drop, this is exactly the kind of light red you'd expect from our haven that is the southern island. This is a complex and enticing cool climate Tasmanian Pinot Noir, with lifted red cherry and plum aromas with nuanced subtle oak spice. Concentrated fruit flavours and perfectly balanced richness are woven together with silver thread of cool-climate acidity making this wine the perfect match to every food occasions. To see it shine though, try it paired with Peking duck.

Awards:
  • Silver at the International Challenge Wine Winner in 2022.
  • Gold at the Melbourne International Wine Competition 2023.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
A bright and aromatic mix of blueberry, raspberry and rhubarb with some cool floral and leafy notes. A fresh, medium bodied and youthful palate, again with bright red fruits, violetty florals and a sapid edge of crushed meadow herbs. Enjoy now with barbequed duck.

Awards:
  • Silver Medal Victorian Wine Show 2022

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: The Aura collection offers a vibrant selection of varietals that embody a lightness and elegance, that are a joy to drink and share. Aura Pinot Noir is bright and lively with nuances of red cherry, raspberry and subtle spice offering a long and fresh finish.

name: Resolution Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Vineyard Region

Tasmania

Colour Description

Deep crimson red.

Aroma Description

A full bodied style of Pinot Noir showing blackberry, sour cherry and hints of cedar from the quality French oak.

Palate Description

The wine displays a juicy fruit driven middle palate with a crisp savoury texture and fine grained tannins.

Peak Drinking Description

Until 2029

Food Pairing Description

A Pinot Noir with this intensity and concentration screams out for quality food accompaniments. Chargrilled lamb cutlets marinated in a chimichurri and served with bok choy, or, a whole roasted duck, Mediterranean vegetables and a deep red wine jus.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Pinot Noir is a complex and mysterious varietal, it truly comes in to its own when grown in the finest terroirs of France in which it develops unrivalled finesse and elegance. The palate is fruity, silky with fine and supple tannins. The finish is long with notes of red fruits and a delicate tannic touch.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Love New Zealand Pinot Noir, we've got a drink for that, Nanny Goat Pinot Noir. Juicy and lively up front, brimming with red cherry, plum, lightly roasted coffee beans and just a hint of sweet baking spice. A streak of fine acidity brightens the mid palate, blending seamlessly with fine powdery tannins to lift the palate towards a satisfying elegant finish.

name: True Colours Pinot Noir 750ml
description: ROB DOLAN TRUE COLOURS PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: The True Colours Yarra Valley Pinot Noir is handpicked and fermented in small open fermenters pressed into French oak. The wine is rich in dark berries, plums and spice with silky tannins and a lingering finish.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: 19 Crimes turned criminals into colonists. Upon conviction, British rogues, guilty of at least one of the 19 Crimes, were sentenced to live in Australia, rather than death. Medium bodied with soft, round tannins, cherry and strawberry fruit sweetness which complements spice oak undertones.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Light sweetness and medium-full body. Soft yet juicy structure with red fruit notes and a lingering finish.

name: Tasmania Pinot Noir 750ml
description: SANDY BAY ESTATE TASMANIA PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: A stunning representation of premium, cool climate Tasmanian Pinot Noir. Elegant structure holds in a tight core of dark cherry and red current fruits. Vibrant acidity keeps the palate fresh, delivering a long, balanced and complex finish. An excellent addition for your next dinner party or personal collection, designed to be enjoyed now or cellared for up to 8 years.

name: Brave New World Pinot Noir 750ml
description: HARDYS BRAVE NEW WORLD PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Hardys continues to push the boundaries of what wine can be. In Brave New World we look to make blends and wines that make you rethink where we can go. The Brave New World Pinot Noir is bright and fruity with hints of confectionary on the nose and has juicy red fruits on the palate.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: The People's Pinot Noir is, designed to be enjoyed by everyone -this easy drinking Pinot Noir opens with inviting aromas of ripe cherries and strawberries, beautifully complemented by hints of vanilla and subtle spice. On the palate, it delivers a luscious burst of juicy black fruit, seamlessly blended with sweet oak nuances that enrich the experience. The soft tannins create a smooth, approachable finish, making this Pinot Noir perfect for any gathering or quiet evening at home. Crafted for every wine lover, The People's Pinot Noir invites you to savour its vibrant character and share in the joy of great wine.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Otago in New Zealand is famous for its rich soils that once yielded the finest gold in the world. Now, Central Otago is celebrated for making some of the world's best Pinot Noir. Alluvial is our new worlds gold vein, rich in red cherry & raspberry aromas with both plum, red berry and delicate chocolate flavours on the palate. Certified Organic.

name: The Borders Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Where the borders of the great winemaking states of South Australia, Victoria and New South Wales converge is the apex of Australian winemaking; a place where the climate, soils and life-giving rivers combine to create ideal conditions for growing premium wine grapes.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Created to drink now, our Classic wines are ideal for those who seek excellent value and reliable quality for every day enjoyment. Jacob's Creek Classic Pinot Noir is bright and juicy Pinot Noir fruit flavours complemented by fine, savoury tannins.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: South Australia's cooler climate regions provide the perfect growing conditions for Pinot Noir in Australia. The wines show freshness and gentle red fruits with medium body and delicate tannins. Vibrant ruby in colour with aromas of cherry, strawberry and rose. The palate is mid-weighted with good intensity and gentle flavours. The raspberry compote fruit is countered by a delicate anise note with a lovely fresh finish.

name: Elevation Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Sourced from premium vineyards in the lofty heights of the Adelaide Hills, Nepenthe Elevation is a collection of wines that expresses the fruit and unique characters from this diverse cool climate region.

Brimming with luscious red fruit flavours of raspberry and red cherries, this Pinot Noir is delicate yet rich. This dry, Provencal style wine has a long zesty refreshing finish.
  • Crafted in the Adelaide Hills

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Oyster Bay's Pinot is packed with bright red berry fruit and just enough structure to hold things in place. It finishes with a lick of zesty acidity and a tendency to disappear fast.

name: The Stag Yarra Valley Pinot Noir 750ml
description: ST HUBERTS THE STAG YARRA VALLEY PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Yarra Pinot red fruits jump out of the glass, with raspberries, cranberries, strawberries, and lashings of cherries. Stalk and earthy notes are in the background, along with savoury spice. Fruit for this wine was harvested from selected premium sites around the Yarra Valley.

name: Bin 23 Pinot Noir 2024 750ml
long_description: Bin 23 derives its name from Cellar 23 at Magill Estate, where Pinot Noir barriques are often stored during maturation. An elegant, lighter bodied inclusion in the Penfolds Collection with fruits sourced from Tasmania's cool-climate conditions for quality grapes.

name: Marlborough Pinot Noir 750ml
description: LAND OF GIANTS MARLBOROUGH PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: In times past, giant, flightless Moa roamed the fertile soils of Marlborough. Big, bold and totally unique as were the legendary Moa, so are the flavours of our Land of Giants wines. A densely perfumed Pinot Noir with aromas of raspberries, blackberries and earthy notes. Wonderfully balanced and lifted with a smooth oaky toastiness. Delicious in every way, pair with roast chicken and all the trimmings.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Pepperjack Central Otago Pinot Noir is a mouth filling dark cherry and luscious cassis character wine matched with supple tannin that gives a silken textural structure. The savoury cocoa and resinous spices from the oak and whole bunch fermentation help draw the red and blue fruits across palate melding to a complex and concentrated finish.

name: Pinot Noir 375ml
long_description: Select parcels from New Zealand went into our wonderfully fruit-driven Pinot Noir, bursting with dark cherry and wild lavender aromas, with notes of red liquorice and clove and a smooth finish.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Created by wine specialists from eleven different countries, this innovative brand aims to bring together the world's best drops under a single, distinctive, quality mark - the woolly red sweater of Tussock Jumper. This pinot noir has delicate flavours of red and blackberries with floral notes. Beautiful and long on the palate with aromas of crushed black fruits and jam it is ideal for fried chicken, as well as soft cheeses. Only the best wines make it to the herd.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Named after a rugged patch in nearby waters, our approach to wine is similar to that of the intrepid sailors who dared to cross it: bold yet humble. Fearless yet considered. Born and bred on the East Coast of Tasmania, out here we hold a special kind of adventurous spirit never fighting against the elements, but rather, knowing when to lean into them. It's here - on this unforgiving stretch of coastline - that something truly special is made. In growing our grapes where the vines meet the sea, each Devil's Corner Estate wine bears the mark of our home.

name: Estate P.e. Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: The P.E. has all the hallmark varietal cues without burning a hole in the wallet. Dark cherries and Christmas cake wave the flag with some underlying liquorice and black forest cake. A shake of leafy dried herbs finishes it off with some white pepper on a very attractive palate.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Lush textural Pinot with intense sweet cherry fruit which is cleverly offset by vibrant acid and a wash of super fine tannin to finish. Amazing value for a classy Marlborough wine and a sure-fire pick to impress any Pinot drinker.

name: Lively Bunch Pinot Noir 750ml
description: JACOB'S CREEK LIVELY BUNCH PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: We've got a hunch; you'll love Lively Bunch Pinot Noir. Bright strawberry & raspberry notes, lifted by fresh acidity. This fun Pinot Noir is perfect for a warm evening. Designed to be drunk chilled, it's the perfect way to enjoy a red wine in the summertime.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Come savour, relax and be transported to the chateau where fun and flavour colide. Every sip is like a fruity punch to the taste buds, a burst of tangy flavour that's so delicious, it's like drinking liquid sunshine. 

Chateau Mârmalade - très delish!

  • Easy Drinking

name: Estate Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: At release, the wine is a bright red with a vibrant purple hue. The wine has enticing, lifted fruit aromas of strawberry and cherry fruits with a touch of spice from oak maturation. Medium-bodied with flavours of ripe cherry, strawberry and light red berry fruits along with a hint of floral violet and sweet spice. The palate is soft and silky. Subtle oak characters of nutmeg and cedar add to the overall complexity. The wine was matured for 6 months in a combination of 1 to 3 year old French oak barrels prior to bottling. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a short term under ideal conditions.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: With intense complex aromas and great depth of character, Red Claw's no-nonsense approach to viticulture and winemaking is clearly visible in this vintage. A fine long juicy palate with a persistent polished finish. Bursting with cherry and dark fruits. Pinot lovers will enter a love affair with this wine. Richly scented with a delicate red fruit spectrum and medium weight, this punches above its price point.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: An elegant and fresh nose of black cherry with hints of toasted hazelnut. On the palate, a beautiful fruitiness enhanced by a very pure structure that fills the mouth, despite light tannins. Carried by its freshness, this dominant of very ripe cherry stretches in length, then evolves on notes of roasted hazelnuts.

name: Terre De Providence Pinot Noir 750ml
description: BIJOU TERRE DE PROVIDENCE PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: A soft and elegant Pinot Noir from the foothills of the Pyrenees mountains, with a core of strawberry and cherry flavours, supported by a touch of pepper, nettle and redcurrant. A pretty wine with pure fruit, a light, refreshing mouthfeel, and fine tannins.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Select parcels from New Zealand went into our wonderfully fruit-driven Pinot Noir, bursting with dark cherry and wild lavender aromas, with notes of red liquorice and clove and a smooth finish.

name: The Shadow Adelaide Hills Pinot Noir 750ml
description: THE GROUP THE SHADOW ADELAIDE HILLS PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
The cooler climate of Adelaide Hills delivers a Pinot Noir with delicate and perfumed florals. On the palate, this wine is a combination of dark cherry, red fruits and subtle spice. This medium bodied pinot noir is well structured with bright acids and balanced oak. This pinot noir has velvety tannins and savoury notes that give beautiful length to this wine.
  • South Australian wine from the Adelaide Hills

  • Australian Pinot Noir crafted by a grower collective with over 100 members.

name: Jacob's Cellar Pinot Noir 750ml
description: JACOB'S CREEK JACOB'S CELLAR PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Jacob's Cellar pays homage to Johann Gramp, who lived and planted his first vines on the banks of Jacob's reek in 1847. With these wines, we celebrate 175 years of Australian winemaking heritage. Our Chief Winemaker selected the best parcels of grapes from a mix of premium regions throughout Australia to deliver this richly flavoured Pinot Noir.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: This is a graceful and elegant pinot noir, vibrant and easy drinking. Raspberries, strawberries, plums and a hint of spice are the prominent aromatics. The tannins are soft and supple, bringing roundness on the palate and balance to the fruit weight.

name: Te Wahi Central Otago Pinot Noir 750ml
description: CLOUDY BAY TE WAHI CENTRAL OTAGO PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
Power and poise in equal measure. Te Whi Central Otago Pinot Noir is the epitome of New Zealand fine wine, the culmination of Cloudy Bay's expertise and Central Otago's terroir. Te Whi means ‘the place' in te reo Mori, reflecting both the importance of terroir and the sense of finding our second home. It is a powerful wine with an opulent core of dark berry fruit and structured tannins. Over time, warm spices and notes of forest floor flourish and provide complexity.

In its relentless passion for exploring new territories, Cloudy Bay arrived in 2010 at the most extreme, southerly and continental New Zealand terroir: Central Otago. Te Wahi was born. It expresses the mysterious side of Central Otago through Cloudy Bay's winemaking lens. The southernmost vineyard on earth, an untamed and hostile territory where Cloudy Bay decided to grow its most exclusive wine. The Te Wahi wines share a wild and dark heart with silky texture and brooding structure. It takes time to understand 'the place', says Viticulturist Jim White. With our work in this region, we have corne to learn the raw terroir and to hone our skills in expressing Central Otago Pinot Noir through the Cloudy Bay winemaking lens.
  • Te Whi Central Otago Pinot Noir is the epitome of New Zealand fine wine, the culmination of Cloudy Bay's expertise and Central Otago's terroir.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Pinot Noir is an ideal red wine for any time of the year. It is bright, juicy and easy to drink.
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!

name: Are You Game Pinot Noir 750ml
description: FOWLES ARE YOU GAME PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
Are you Game? are a collection of high-altitude Victorian wines crafted by Fowles to match with the texture and flavours of real food sourced from the land. Intensely aromatic, fine in texture and wildly delicious, Are you Game? wines are blended with a dash of another varietal to add complexity and encourage discovery in food and wine.
  • Intensely aromatic

  • Fine in texture

  • Crafted to complement the textures and flavours of wild food

  • Unique labelling

name: Wild Ferment Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Smooth texture with cherry, dried strawberry & sweet spice.

name: Tiwha Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Perfumed nose with crushed rose petal and lavender, Damson plums and bramble berry underpinned by delicate dried herbs and thyme. Dark red fruits and cranberry abound on the palate with elegant and delicately integrated tannins finely balanced by a minerality, showing good palate tension and linear length.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Located in the heart of Bellarine Peninsula on Victoria's south coast, the vineyards overlook Port Phillip Bay to Melbourne and the Bass Strait to the south in a cool, maritime climate. Rich volcanic soils, meticulous viticulture and minimal intervention winemaking results in wines expressive of their terroir.Scotchmans Hill always come to the party when it comes to showcasing the true regional characteristics with their wines, the Pinot particularly exemplifies the maritime climate. Lifted dry savoury red fruits with hints of cedar leaf with good length. For those with patience, aging will reward with more pronounced Burgundian characters emerging. Bellarine Pinot at its best!  95 Points   James Halliday.

name: Bulloak Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Lifted berry fruits with savory undertones. A dash of spice and fine soft tannins. Luscious plum and dark cherries, with subtle spicy oak characters and fine tannins. Luscious dark berry fruit, toasty oak, fine tannins with a smooth finish.

Colour: Mid ruby red.
Aroma: Red cherry and cranberry with winter spices and a touch of cedar.
Palate: Dark berries, tangerine and forest fruits with subtle toasty oak and silky tannins.
Food Match: Seared duck breast.

The Bulloak range draws its name from the majestic stand of Bulloak (Buloke) trees located at our Zilzie property, providing a scenic backdrop to our vineyards and winery. With a commitment to preserving the land, the Forbes family generously returned this area to the Department of Sustainability & Environment. This act safeguards not only the Bulloak trees but also the region's rich natural diversity, ensuring a legacy for generations to come.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: The aroma is rich with flavours of ripe blackcurrant and savoury herbs. The flavour shows spice and vanilla oak with a smooth structure and silky finish. The palate of the Louis De Camponac Pinot Noir is rich and generous with a real vitality that is heightened by the creamy sensation in the mouth. There is also crisp acidity and creamy texture on the palate as well. It is an ideal accompaniment to easily prepared fatty cured meats such as salami and prosciutto.

name: Lighten Up Pinot Noir 750ml
description: TEMPUS TWO LIGHTEN UP PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
Tempus Two Lighten Up Pinot Noir is your go-to fruity red wine that effortlessly transitions from a summer wine to a delightful Christmas wine. Whether used to sip or cook, this versatile Pinot Noir offers a guilt-free indulgence with 40% lower calories and only 51% alcohol content.

Experience the symphony of black cherries and red berries, elegantly balanced by a soft, juicy texture and enduring length.

Sustainably produced, 100% of our winery energy is sourced from solar and wind power, we also use 100% biodegradable paper stock on our Tempus Two Lighten Up labels and recycled cartons only.
  • Lower Alcohol

  • Reduced Calories

  • Full Flavour

  • 4 Standard Drinks

name: Taste Collection Velvety Pinot Noir 750ml
description: SELAKS TASTE COLLECTION VELVETY PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
The Taste Collection is a celebration of the generous and distinct flavours that have made Selaks wines so extraordinary and sought after for over 90 years. We've called this Pinot Noir Velvety because it glides smoothly and softly on the palate from start to finish. An elegant style with abundant flavours of dark cherry, plum and spice. Ready to enjoy now! Selaks, bringing family and friends together since 1934.
  • Velvety flavour

  • Heritage brand with 90 years worth of winemaking experience.

name: Reserve Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Rapaura Springs have turned plenty of heads with their current releases - the Reserve Pinot Noir is little short of jaw dropping. Dark berry fruits, Doris plum and violet aromas combine with underlying thyme and savoury oak aspects. The palate is full of vibrant dark fruit flavours, spicy oak, and a savoury influence. A softly textured wine, the fine tannins combine with the concentrated fruit flavours, and a delicate acidity, for a lingering finish. Drink it with five spice duck.

name: Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description: Devil(ish) is inspired by the wilderness of Tasmania and is dedicated to supporting the ongoing conservation of this pristine location and the unique and wonderful creatures that call Tassie home, including the iconic Tasmanian Devil. Notes of red currants & cherry combined with an earthy texture makes this wine as bold and loveable as our Tassie Devil.

name: Chill No Chill 750ml
long_description:
Chill ~ 10-14°C: When this wine is chilled, you will experience a fresh, supple, spicy and gentle red wine.
No Chill ~ 18-20°C: When not chilled, this wine is spectacularly fragrant, thoughtful, calm, so alluring and expressive. Deeply perfumed, with violets and red fruits - sheer deliciousness.

name: Red Blend 750ml
long_description:
At Chateau Marmalade, we make wine that's fun, yum and uncomplicated. Bursting with juicy, magnifique flavours, when life gets too serious, grab a wine that doesn't. 

This fruit-forward Red Blend is an easy drinking wine with a soft lingering finish. An excellent addition to any charcuterie board.

So come on, sip from the jar - it's Tres Delish!

  • Easy Drinking

name: 19 Crimes Snoop Dogg Cali Smooth 750ml : ea
long_description: A gentle spin on Cali Red with softer tannins and moderate acidity, this red blend offers a super smooth experience. Cali Smooth is ripe in taste with dark fruit notes and toasted oak. Caramel and vanilla undertones make for a silky-smooth finish.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description: This Shiraz offers a wonderful blend of red fruits and liquorice on the palate that will excite. Added complexity of coffee and coconut is provided by the subtle use of oak. Whispers Shiraz is a great accompaniment to roasted or grilled meats such as beef or even a hamburger off the BBQ would suit it too, as well as hard cheeses such as cheddar and parmesan. Put one in your cart today and bring it out at your next dinner gathering.

name: Barry & Sons' Malbec 750ml
long_description:
Rich purple in colour with aromas of violets, redcurrants, maraschino cherries and lavender. The palate displays flavours of liquorice, violets, dark chocolate and blueberries.
  • Fresh, fruit driven with a silky tannin profile

  • 'Drink now' style- purposely made in approachable style to be consumed as a young wine

  • Lighter bodied than other classic Clare Valley red styles

name: Malbec 375ml
long_description: Deep brooding colour with aromas of plum, blueberry and sweet spices. The palate is generous with flavours of blackberry, blue fruits and baking spice. The plush tannins are complemented by refreshing and long finish. By buying this Malbec you've done a drop of good because we are giving 50c from every bottle purchased to Clean Up Australia. A small bottle of wine that is big on flavour and big on doing a drop of good.

name: Malbec 750ml
long_description: The Fat Bastard Malbec is a medium purple hue. The nose has aromas of black cherry and ripe blackberry with hints of fresh cedar. The palate upfront is dark fruited and juicy, tangy blueberry, and ripe plums. Followed by a smoky cured meats and fine chalky tannins.The fruit is sourced from the home of malbec- Mendoza in Argentina. Juicy style with layers of berry fruits and fine but apparent tannins makes this a perfect match to meat dishes.

name: Rosso Lambrusco 750ml
long_description: A great value drop, made in the typical semi-sweet style with a pleasant touch of spritz on the palate. Donnari Lambrusco is a great match for hearty Italian foods including Bolognese sauce, cold meats and cheese.

name: Red Blend 750ml
long_description: Fifth Leg likes to explore great questions over a good wine: like why was a fossilised skeleton of a Tasmanian Tiger found in the Devil's Lair cave in WA and why was a mysterious 'fifth leg' found with the remains? Fifth Leg has developed a reputation as a 'refined larrikin' - serious about wine and the good things in life, but not at the expense of simple, easy-going fun.

name: The Holy Trinity Gsm 750ml
description: GRANT BURGE THE HOLY TRINITY GSM 750ML:EA

name: American Oak Malbec 750ml
long_description: Violets, fresh plum & dark chocolate.

name: Shiraz 2014 CLR 750ml
long_description: Pepperjacks winemakers have created a range of rich and honest wines. These wines are a tribute to the Barossa's rich heritage and showcase the regions outstanding qualities. The 2014 Shiraz has been aged to perfection in our climate controlled cellar which has enable the wine to fully develop and display the characteristics that have made the Barossa so famous. Our Museum Release range features hidden treasures from the cellars that have been aged to perfection. These rare back-vintage wines are extremely limited and come from some of Australias most prestigious wineries.

name: Vr Shiraz 1l
long_description: Hardys Varietal Range Shiraz is well-rounded Shiraz with flavours of sweet ripe plum and red berries that are complemented by subtle spice on the finish - great with Italian inspired dishes.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description:
Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Created to drink now, our Classic wines are ideal for those who seek excellent value and reliable quality for every day enjoyment. A soft, approachable medium-bodied Shiraz with vibrant fruit flavours. Great with roast leg of lamb or hard cheeses such as Cheddar.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added

name: St Henri Shiraz 2017 750ml
long_description: When young, this exceptional shiraz gives plenty of black cherry and dark berry notes laced with savoury spices. A layer of creamy liqueur character adds complexity. Concentrated and age-worthy, expect earthy and chocolate tones to develop over time. A wine built for the long haul.

name: Tintara Mclaren Vale Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Founded in 1861, Tintara the home of Hardy's, remains a testament to quality winemaking, combining age old methods and new technology. Our Tintara range reflects Thomas Hardy's mission to create wines that were a true expression of the remarkable McLaren Vale region. The Hardys Tintara Shiraz has concentrated flavours of dark forest fruits, plum and cocoa to complement the sweet vanilla oak. Fine grained tannin carries the balance of this luscious McLaren red which gives the palate a rich and even persistence.

name: The Stag Heathcote Shiraz 750ml
description: ST HUBERTS THE STAG HEATHCOTE SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description: A complex and attractive mix of dark and blue fruits with earthy undertones. Just like the noble creature, The Stag wines represent elegance, grace and esteem. The wine has lovely depth without being overbearing. Ripe, fine tannins and good length with dark fruits and a hint of oak.

name: Grey Label Mclaren Vale Shiraz 2017 CLR 750ml
description: WOLF BLASS GREY LABEL MCLAREN VALE SHIRAZ 2017 (CLR) 750ML:EA
long_description: Highly acclaimed and proudly iconic, the Grey Label range offers benchmark South Australian wines from exceptional vineyards. McLaren Vale Shiraz is inherently suited to the Grey Label style, rich, plush and powerful, yet with an approachability that provides sheer enjoyment throughout its evolution over time in bottle.

name: Double Barrel Rum Shiraz Cabernet 750ml
description: JACOB'S CREEK DOUBLE BARREL RUM SHIRAZ CABERNET 750ML:EA
long_description: Jacob's Creek Double Barrel Rum Shiraz Cabernet is a finely balanced mixture of ripe dark fruits and fine texture. The Barossa Valley offers fruit of intensity with ripe dark berry flavours and outstanding freshness. Selectively finished in aged Caribbean rum barrells.

name: St Andrews Shiraz 750ml
long_description: The wine offers ripe, concentrated aromas of violets, blackberry, red plum, and licorice, with layers of mocha, vanilla, and spice from American oak. Generous and mouth-filling, it features fresh blackberry and red plum flavors, hints of violets and clove spice, and a seamless palate with mid-palate richness. The finish is long and lingering with fine-grained tannins.

name: Grange Shiraz 2020 Gift Box 750ml
long_description: Grange is arguably Australia's most celebrated wine. Crafted with intensely structured shiraz grapes for an Australian style recognised as one of the world's great wines. With an unbroken line of vintages from the experimental 1951, Grange demonstrates the synergy between shiraz and South Australia.

name: Match Made Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Vibrant red colour. Aromas of strawberry, plum and blueberries with hints of charry oak. Palate shows bright juicy fruit, which is soft and round with gentle chalky tannins.

name: Jaraman Shiraz 750ml
long_description: At release, the wine has a deep cerise red colour to the centre with a vibrant purple hue to the edges. The wine has an intoxicating explosion of ripe black plum, blackberry and raspberry fruit along with a hints of vanilla bean and clove spice. This is a magnificently luscious, full-bodied wine with layers of flavour. Dazzling ripe fruit flavours of cherries and plum along with confectionary red currant characters combine artfully attractive oak characters of roasted coffee beans and spice. Overall, the wine is well balanced with superb form and shape, the well-integrated oak tannins providing the palate with firm structure and delicious, persistent length. The wine was matured in a selection of American oak hogsheads (combination of new and older oak) for an average of 12 - 15 months before being bottled. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a long term under ideal conditions.

name: Bin 28 Shiraz 2022 750ml
long_description: First produced in 1959, Bin 28 is Penfolds earliest Bin-range wine, a voluminous and glossy shiraz. With an interwoven tannic structure and alluring tobacco and dried fruit notes, this is a satisfying red wine for mature cheese and savoury dishes.

name: Jacob's Cellar Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Jacob's Cellar pays homage to Johann Gramp, who lived and planted his first vines on the banks of Jacob's reek in 1847. With these wines, we celebrate 175 years of Australian winemaking heritage. Our Chief Winemaker selected the best parcels of grapes from a mix of premium regions throughout Australia to deliver this richly flavoured Shiraz

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Come with us & traipse down the vineyards, where the grapes flourish. After all, the best things in life are... made from grapes! A fresh fruit driven Shiraz. Blackberries and plums with a hint of white pepper & aniseed.

name: St Henri Shiraz 2016 750ml
long_description: When young, this exceptional shiraz gives plenty of black cherry and dark berry notes laced with savoury spices. A layer of creamy liqueur character adds complexity. Concentrated and age-worthy, expect earthy and chocolate tones to develop over time. A wine built for the long haul.

name: Bin 28 Shiraz 2023 750ml
long_description: Penfolds Bin 28 Shiraz is a robustensemble of warm-climate Shiraz. The2023 vintage eloquently expressesPenfolds House Style, balancing fruitintensity with a structure poisedfor ageing. This makes it both animmediate pleasure and a candidatefor cellaring, promising to evolve with complexity over time.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description: 19 Crimes turned criminals into colonists. Upon conviction, British rogues, guilty of at least one of the 19 Crimes, were sentenced to live in Australia, rather than death. The 19 Crimes Shiraz is full of flavours of raspberries, dark plums, and chocolate. Plush tannins provide a lingering finish.

name: The Siege By  Mclaren Vale Shiraz 750ml
description: THE GROUP THE SIEGE MCLAREN VALE SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description: This limited release is rich and complex with layers of dark fruit and hints of cocoa and spice. Using grapes sourced from a biodynamically farmed vineyard, The Siege showcases the benefits of the soils and vines operating in natural harmony to produce a stunning McLaren Vale Shiraz.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description:
It's always a proud moment when a wine on our shelves wins gold. From a family owned estate in the Margaret River, this shiraz is complex, compelling and simply moreish. What a beauty.

This drop is one powerful, yet medium-bodied, expression of a Margaret River shiraz. After 12 months in barrel, there is then a careful selection process whereby the best, most expressive barrels are used for the final blend. The result is a complex, compelling shiraz with dark plums and ripe anise-like spice on the nose, silky tannins and understated oak nicely completing this morish red wine.

  • Trophy Best Shiraz Category - The Royal Hobart Wine Show 2022.
  • Gold Sydney Wine Show 2022.
  • Silver Royal Queensland Wine Awards.

name: The Stag Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Quintessentially Victorian, they are made in a classic cool climate style. Full bodied, balanced, Shiraz. Morello cherries, plums, potpourri, and spice fill the mouth. The wine is bold and generous, without being too heavy. Velvety tannins with a plum - chocolate finish.

name: La Petite Beaute Shiraz 750ml
description: HENTLEY FARM LA PETITE BEAUTE SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description:
Hentley Farm winery is nestled into the foothills of the Western Barossa in Seppeltsfield. The wines produced from this part of Barossa are rich and supple. They are highly perfumed, with fine grained tannin profiles. La Petite Beaute is carefully nurtured from the vineyard to the bottle, gently basket-pressed, and ahed in French oak to preserve these beautiful characteristics. 

A rich and well balanced Shiraz. It has bright red and blue fruit characters that are complemented with layers of spice. The wine is well balanced with a fine lingering finish with savoury notes and florals.

name: Faith 375ml
long_description: Faith Shiraz is a vibrant and expressive example of Barossa Shiraz. An accessible, juicy and fruit driven wine, Faith's vibrant yet dense purple hue hints at the generosity of fruit within. The bouquet is lifted with bright cherry fruit characters and a hint of chocolate with enticing spice notes.This is followed by dark berry fruits that combine with a lively palate entwined with pepper spices and chocolate tones. A long savoury finish is coated in soft tannins to complete this rich and generous palate.

name: 5th Generation Barossa Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Impressive aromas of blackberry and ripe red berry fruit, with a touch of anise and subtle oak that adds vanilla and spice characters. The medium bodied palate is full of sweet fruit and ripe tannins. The multi-layered depth of flavour and texture, combined with a long lingering finish, provide this wine with wonderful drinkability.

name: Revolution Shiraz 750ml
long_description: This Shiraz, with its lighter body, showcases remarkable restraint while delivering robust flavours. Its well-rounded profile, featuring soft tannins and lasting intensity, makes a true crowd-pleaser. Perfectly paired with a cheese patter.

name: The Borders Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Where the borders of the great winemaking states of South Australia, Victoria and New South Wales converge is the apex of Australian winemaking; a place where the climate, soils and life-giving rivers combine to create ideal conditions for growing premium wine grapes.

name: Mclaren Vale Shiraz 375ml
long_description: Lifted spicy cloves, hint of musky redskin with vanilla bean spice and faint zataar notes. Fig seed with spicy ripe red plum. Complex dark fruit conserve aromas of mulberry & blackberry.A rich full palate, with fleshy mulberry fruits. Subtle use of oak further adds complexity with good flavor and balance with some fine, powdery tannins evident. A well-balanced wine with great depth, length and structure. Now available in a 375ml half bottle.

name: Second Blooming Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Second Blooming by Petaluma is a new range of contemporary and minimal preservative wines. Embodied by the beauty of South Australia's native blooms. Vibrant in the glass, displaying all the uplifted nuances of our Limestone Coast vineyards. A perfect reflection of vineyard to glass without much intervention.

name: Blockhead Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Blockhead Shiraz displays a perfumed nose lifted with ripe blackberry and Mulberry, a hint of chocolate with enticing vanilla spice notes. A plush and slurpy palate bursting with juicy forest berries, fine coating tannins locked intricately together by a delicious vanillin oak undertone.

name: Shoulder To Shoulder Shiraz 750ml
description: PETER LEHMANN SHOULDER TO SHOULDER SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description:
Our winemakers believe that truly great wines are made in the
vineyard. They work closely with local grape growers to capture the
individual essence of each site, to create excellent wines
that express a sense of place.
Our Shoulder to Shoulder wines celebrate the longstanding
friendships of our winemakers and grape growers. Sourced from
premium Barossa and Eden Valley vineyards, this Shiraz has been
matured in French and American hogsheads for 14 months. The
result is a wine bright in colour displaying classic regional avours
of plum and chocolate with earthy undertones. It has a full, round
palate in which the seamless tannins blend with the concentrated
fruit to provide richness, making it a wonderful food wine.

name: Koonunga Hill Shiraz 750ml
long_description: Ripe plum, blueberry & sweet spice - undeniably South Australian shiraz. The palate shows flint, liquorice, smoked meat & paprika. Integrated tannins remind us of the wine's place in the Penfolds family.

name: The Murder Mclaren Vale Shiraz 750ml
description: THE GROUP THE MURDER MCLAREN VALE SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description:
