name: Watermelon Vodka Based Liqueur 700ml
description: VODKA CRUISER WATERMELON VODKA BASED LIQUEUR 700ML:EA
long_description:
This premium triple distilled vodka based liqueur is sweet, delicious and full of wicked melon flavour. Vodka Cruiser Flavours will take your serve to the next level or mix with other flavours for amped up taste.
  • Made in Australia

name: Vodka 50ml
long_description:
Smirnoff Vodka is triple distilled and exceptionally smooth. Ten Times filtered in a unique process for ultimate clarity, making it perfect for use in cocktails and mixed drinks.
  • 50mL miniature bottle

  • Triple distilled

  • Exceptionally smooth

name: Sensations Espresso Fire Vodka 50ml
long_description:
Ignite your senses with Smirnoff Espresso Fire. A new taste sensation, with an unexpected kick. Deliciously spicy, the Fire explodes upfront with warming heat and a tasty fiery caramel espresso flavour.

Best served ice cold, straight from the fridge. For an extra flavour kick, garnish with half a strawberry.

name: Vodka 200ml
long_description: Get into the gift giving spirit with this 200mL Grey Goose mini vodka bottle. Makes the perfect secret Santa gift. Distilled using French wheat from the La Beauce region and made with water from the Gensac that is filtered through champagne limestone, Grey Goose claim to make the "World's best tasting vodka". Why not give it a try, they may be right. Clear, fresh with an elegant floral aroma accented by a subtle citrus note. Initially soft with a gentle sweetness that gradually envelops the mouth - smooth and rounded texture with a hint of almond. Fresh and bright throughout with a long, satisfying finish.

name: 1l
long_description: Super smooth Vodka O has won the 2010 Vodka Masters gold medal in London. Being triple distilled, made from whey, pure Australian water and charcoal filtering creates an exquisite silky clean taste, free from impurities. A very smooth vodka indeed, finishes wonderfully dry with no trace of spirit heat. Very purely flavoured and perfect for martinis.

name: Vanilla Vodka 700ml
long_description:
Absolut Vanilia - a vanilla flavored vodka with a magnificent flavor that can enhance pretty much anything, just became even better with our latest upgrade. Perfect for those with a sweet tooth or the ones that are into experimenting with contrasting flavors. The versatility of vanilia is also true when making drinks - regardless if you're going for something simple like a Vanilia Espresso Martini, or something as provocative as a Pornstar Martini
  • Using hardy winter wheat from hus ensures superior quality and taste in every bottle of Absolut Vodka. With yields twice as high as the global average for wheat production, our wheat creates a smooth and refined vodka experience that's unmatched.

  • Our water, tapped locally from deep wells filtered through Swedish bedrock for thousands of years, provides a natural mouthfeel that elevates the taste of Absolut Vodka.

name: Pure Vodka 1l
long_description:
New bottle, Same Taste, 100% Organic Polish Rye

Belvedere Organic Vodka is a Luxury Polish Vodka, produced in Poland's longest operating vodka distillery, founded in 1910. Belvedere Organic Vodka is created from 100% Organic Polish rye.

Belvedere's Master Rye Distillers draw from a 600-year-old Polish vodka-making tradition, to artfully craft Polish rye into an extraordinary vodka of distinct taste and character.

Made with Organic Polish rye, purified water and distilled by fire, Belvedere Organic Vodka is structured and elegant with hints of almond, vanilla and white pepper, followed by a smooth velvety finish.
  • New bottle, same taste, 100% Organic Polish Rye

  • 100% Organic Polish Rye

  • We plant four times more organic rye for each bottle of Belvedere Organic Vodka, it is exceptionally scarce
ingredients: Made with 100% Organic Polish rye, purified water and distilled by fire. Belvedere Vodka uses only natural ingredients without the use of any synthetic fertilisers or pesticides.

name: Boysenberry Vodka Based Liqueur 700ml
description: VODKA CRUISER BOYSENBERRY VODKA BASED LIQUEUR 700ML:EA
long_description:
This premium triple distilled vodka based liqueur is sweet, delicious and full of bangin' berry flavour. Vodka Cruiser Flavours will take your serve to the next level or mix with other flavours for amped up taste.
  • Made in Australia

name: 1l
long_description:
BLCK Vodka is distilled five times and charcoal filtered, creating a premium vodka at an affordable price. Its clean, smooth, and ideal for every cocktail occasion plus its gluten free to boot. 

Awards:
Silver San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2023.
Silver Critics Challenge International Wine & Spirits Competition 2023.

name: 700ml
long_description:
Established in Australia, the first batch of Vodka O was bottled in an old mechanics Sydney garage in 2003. Since then, Vodka O has won multiple awards:
O Gold Medal - 2010 Vodka Masters in London
O Gold Medal - World Spirit Awards 2015
O Silver Medal - International Wine and Spirit (IWSC) Awards 2019

Finished dry with limited traces of spirit heat. Vodka O is gluten free, triple-distilled, 100% whey-based from naturally grass-fed New Zealand cows and charcoal filtered for a cleaner, smoother taste. It is a full-strength bottled spirit that is three-times distilled and filtered through activated carbon to make it one of the most impurity-free vodkas on the market.
  • Gluten Free

  • Charcoal Filtered

  • Premium Triple Distilled Vodka

  • Established 2003 in Australia

name: Australian Crafted Vodka 700ml
long_description: Crafted in Melbourne, Baxter Vodka uses a unique blend of Sugarcane and Grain to create an exceptionally smooth vodka. All natural, gluten free and 100% Australian.

name: Sensations Lemon Freeze Vodka 700ml
long_description:
Ignite your senses with Smirnoff Lemon Freeze. A new taste sensation, with an unexpected kick. Bursting with complex citrus notes, Freeze leaves an unexpectedly colder-than-ice freeze sensation in your mouth long after the drink is finished.

Best served ice cold, straight from the fridge. For an extra flavour kick, garnish with a sugar-coated lemon wedge.

name: Sensations Espresso Fire Vodka 700ml
long_description:
Ignite your senses with Smirnoff Espresso Fire. A new taste sensation, with an unexpected kick. Deliciously spicy, the Fire explodes upfront with warming heat and a tasty fiery caramel espresso flavour.

Best served ice cold, straight from the fridge. For an extra flavour kick, garnish with half a strawberry.

name: Passionfruit Vodka Based Liqueur 700ml
description: VODKA CRUISER PASSIONFRUIT VODKA BASED LIQUEUR 700ML:EA
long_description:
This premium triple distilled vodka based liqueur is sweet, delicious and full of punchy tropical flavour. Vodka Cruiser Flavours will take your serve to the next level or mix with other flavours for amped up taste.
  • Made in Australia

name: Handmade Vodka 38% 700ml
long_description: Subtle sweetness with creamy mouthfeel and balanced finish. Clean minerality with grain character evident and a faint hint of tinned sweet corn.

name: Watermelon Vodka 700ml
long_description:
Absolut Watermelon is without a doubt our new summer favorite. The refreshing taste of sweet watermelon makes it an easy-to-mix must have, perfect for backyard parties or front porch chilling alike. With Absolut Watermelon you are
nearly there, drink in hand. Just add soda, tonic or coke, serve in a highball glass or bring a pitcher for your friends to enjoy the liquid summer vibes of Absolut.
  • Using hardy winter wheat from hus ensures superior quality and taste in every bottle of Absolut Vodka. With yields twice as high as the global average for wheat production, our wheat creates a smooth and refined vodka experience that's unmatched.

  • Our water, tapped locally from deep wells filtered through Swedish bedrock for thousands of years, provides a natural mouthfeel that elevates the taste of Absolut Vodka.

name: Vodka 500ml
long_description: Five Diamonds Vodka is a clean and smooth Vodka at a great price making it the perfect accompaniment for your next cocktail party.

name: Tasmanian Vodka 200ml
long_description: Pure Origin is handcrafted, small batch premium vodka, distilled using a copper pot still in Tasmania and refined using pure spring water from the slopes of Mount Wellington. The result is a clean, crisp vodka of exceptional purity with a medium body and tasting notes of citrus peel and cracked peppercorns. Best served on the rocks, or with your favourite mixer. Proudly Tasmanian and Vegan friendly. 200ml bottle

name: Classic Vodka 200ml
long_description: 23rd Street Classic Vodka is a true embodiment of Australia's  essence. Crafted from premium grains sourced exclusively from  Australian farms, its distilled at least six times ensuring absolute crystal clarity. The result, a vodka that is exceptionally  smooth and crisp with a subtle naturally occurring sweetness.

name: Vodka 1l
long_description:
GREY GOOSE vodka is the result of an absolute determination to create a French vodka unlike any other. This extraordinary vodka is made from the best ingredients from France, soft winter wheat and Gensac spring water. GREY GOOSE is best enjoyed straight, with a mixer, in a Spritz or in a classic vodka Martini or Espresso Martini cocktail.
  • Grey Goose premium flavoured vodka is created using only the finest French ingredients.

  • Grey Goose Vodka's two single-origin ingredients are winter wheat from Picardie and spring water from Gensac-la-Pallue.

  • The soft winter wheat used in Grey Goose Vodka is the same high quality wheat used in famous French breads and pastries.

  • The water used in Grey Goose is naturally filtered through underground limestone so deep it's untouched by pollutants.

  • The two ingredients of Grey Goose Vodka are traceable from field to bottle.

name: 1.125l
long_description: One of our most popular Vodkas, BLCK Vodka is distilled five times and charcoal filtered, creating a premium vodka at an affordable price. Its clean, smooth, and ideal for every cocktail occasion plus its gluten free to boot.

name: Extra 13yo Bourbon Cask Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: CHIVAS REGAL EXTRA 13YO BOURBON CASK SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Selectively matured in Bourbon casks to give a honeyed and toasted interpretation of the Chivas house style. Sweet & fruity with notes of honey, grapefruit, apples, and vanilla. 
  • Award-winning blended Scotch

  • Finished in ex-Bourbon Casks
ingredients: Scotch Whisky (cereal and malt distillates with water), colourant: plain caramel

name: Whip Irish Whiskey Liqueur 700ml
long_description:
This retro-looking bottle is an Irish whiskey liqueur called Shanky's Whip! A base of spicy Irish whiskey has been infused with vanilla and caramel, so it's super creamy. Plus, the chap on the label is being pulled along by an ostrich. What's not to like?

Shanky was always one to buck the trend - he liked the idea of Irish Whiskey - but he did not like the burn - he liked the taste of Cream - but he did not like the texture...and he loved Stout - which is of course, black! So, he had a lightbulb moment... and Shanky's Whip was born. A blend of black Irish Whiskey, Irish spirits and delicious natural flavour of cream and vanilla. Combined these make for a wonderful drink on its own or mixed in a cocktail or with cola.

name: 12yo Sherry Oak Single Malt Whisky 700ml
description: THE MACALLAN 12YO SHERRY OAK SINGLE MALT WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Rich and complex, The Macallan Sherry Oak Collection is influenced by sherry seasoned European oak casks. Each single malt is characterised by natural mahogany hues and interlocking notes of succulent dried fruits and ginger, with a depth of flavour and wood spice that intensifies through the range.

The Macallan reimagined is seen through the lens of artistic translator, David Carson, and celebrates the journey of our sherry seasoned oak casks.

name: 12yo Single Malt Whisky 750ml
long_description: This is a 12 year old single malt produced at the Mortlach distillery in Speyside, unveiled recently as part of a trio including a 16YO & 20YO. This particular expression features the subtitle The Wee Witchie, which comes from the name of the tiny still that distils a portion of the whisky. It's drawn from bourbon and sherry casks, and packs a hearty punch of meaty Mortlachy malt at its core, supported by dried fruit and toffee notes. The nose is rich in toasted almond, cinder toffee and heavy barley. The palate displays warming oak and soft raisins, with a bit of olive oil salinity mixed in and lingering citrus oils cutting through on the finish.

name: 17yo Whisky 700ml
long_description: Complex, with distinctive butterscotch, sherried fruit and peat smoke aromas. Big, full-flavoured, with excellent balance, develops slowly, full of sherry sweet malty tones, and a touch peat smoke. The finish is long lasting and smooth, with a hint of spice and sherry sweetness. Overall combines the smoothness of our younger whiskies with the greater depth of our older expressions.

name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 50ml
long_description: Laphroaig is Gaelic for 'the beautiful hollow by the broad bay'. Opened in 1815 this distillery has a wonderful history and produces exceptionally memorable whisky. Positioned in a bay sheltered by rocky islands the distillery has the warm seas of the Gulf Stream nearby to help in maturation process. The water comes from Kilbride Dam a natural water source on Islay. In making Laphroaig, malted barley is dried over a peat fire. The smoke from this peat, found only on Islay, gives Laphroaig its particularly rich flavour. American bourbon casks are used to mature this whisky and they produce a unique 10, 18 and 25 year old range of single malts. Laphroaig 10 is a smokey, full bodied whisky with strong peaty characteristics.

name: 15yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: THE GLENLIVET 15YO SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description: In the beginning the remote and isolated Livet valley made an ideal location for illicit distillation. This is where The Glenlivet founder George Smith learned his craft. Hidden away from the Customs Officers and soldiers amongst the hills and abundant springs, George had time to distil slowly making a whisky that would become world renowned. To this day, The Glenlivet remains the benchmark that all other Speyside single malts are measured against.Selective maturation in new French limousin oak casks (popular for maturing cognac) creates a characterful and unique expression of The Glenlivet. The rich, spicy notes from French oak interplay with the fruit and floral notes of The Glenlivet. A delicious whisky to savour.

name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description: Full flavoured, with a background of peat smoke. The body is firm with a slight oiliness and the finish is long with noticeable oak.

name: Wee Beastie Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: ARDBEG WEE BEASTIE SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Ardbeg Wee Beastie is the latest permanent expression to join the Distillery's Ultimate Range. At just five years old, Wee Beastie is a feisty young creature with a formidable taste. Young and intensely smoky, this is a dram untamed by age. Matured in ex-bourbon and Oloroso sherry casks, Wee Beastie is perfect for enjoying neat or as the mouth-watering main ingredient in a powerfully smoky cocktail.

Award winning:
International Spirits Challenge 2024  - Gold Medal
San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2024 - Gold Medal
International Whisky Competition 2024
- Best Single Malt Scotch 10 Year Old and Under: 92.9pts 
- Best Peated Single Malt Scotch: Gold Medal (92.9 pts)
- Best Islay Single Malt: Gold Medal (92.9 pts)
  • Ardbeg's portfolio of Whiskies is the most awarded of all the Islay and Island Malts. Ardbeg has won 55 gold, double gold or best in class medals since 2008, a sure sign of exceptional quality and highly reassuring to consumers.

name: 16yo Irish Malt Whiskey 700ml
long_description:
Bushmills Single Malt Whiskey 16 year old is aged for 16 years in a combination of Oloroso Sherry and Bourbon-seasoned casks, then matured for several months in port wine barrels. The unique maturation process gives this single malt its distinct notes of juicy fruits, nuts and spice, as well as a hint of ruby redness. It's best enjoyed neat or over ice.

  • Single Malt Whiskey

  • Aged 16 years

name: 18yo Infinita Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: GLENMORANGIE 18YO INFINITA SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
The 18 Years Old is a single malt Scotch whisky of serious distinction. Once it has spent fifteen years maturing in American white oak casks approximately 30% is transferred into Spanish Oloroso casks to spend a further three years maturing. Then, when both elements have reached 18 years, we blend them back together to create a whisky with a rich bouquet and full, rounded flavour. For a whisky of this age this expression has maintained, thanks to our delicate floral spirit and fine Oloroso casks, an incredible degree of vibrancy where the raisiny sweetness of the sherry has been toned down by the nuttiness of the American oak. Through the years, our whisky creators have dedicated themselves to their craft, in pursuit of perfection. These peerless whiskies are the culmination of their art. In celebration of such mastery, we bring their most rare and treasured creations to the discerning connoisseur.

Award winning: 
New York World Spirit Competition 2023 - Double Gold Medal
International Whisky Competition 2023 - Best Single Malt Scotch 3rd Place: 88.98 Pts
International Spirits Competition 2023  - Gold Medal
  • To create it, we gather the silky, fruity spirit from our giraffe-high stills and let it steep in American oak casks. No less than 15 years later, we transfer a portion into Oloroso sherry casks for three more years.

name: Tasmanian Single Malt Whisky 700ml
long_description:
Lamplighter Tasmanian Single Malt American Oak & Red Wine Cask takes you on a captivating flavour adventure. A true standout in the world of whisky. This exceptional expression is crafted with meticulous care, combining the richness of American Oak and the complexity of Red Wine Cask maturation.

Aged in American oak casks, it boasts a solid foundation of smooth vanilla and caramel. The magic truly unfolds with the addition of a red wine cask finish, introducing notes of strawberry jam, plum, and a hint of spice.

On the palate, the whisky is smooth and well-rounded, with the oak influence balanced by the subtle sweetness of the red wine. Hints of custard apple and toasted hazelnut add complexity, while the finish is long and lingering, leaving a pleasant warmth and a touch of red fruit lingering on the tongue.

name: Sandend Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: GLENGLASSAUGH SANDEND SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description: Sweet, biscuity malt brings hints of dried mango and semi-ripe banana. Those notes are echoed in a medium to full bodied delivery, and although the 'tropicality' isn't as intense as the label suggests, the texture is juicy, borderline oily, with a salt'n'pepper bite wrapping up the profile in lively fashion.

name: Founders Reserve Single Malt Whisky 200ml
description: THE GLENLIVET FOUNDERS RESERVE SINGLE MALT WHISKY 200ML:EA
long_description:
George Smith was the first licensed distiller in the parish of The Glenlivet – tenacious in the face of adversity, he bravely set the tone for future whisky makers. The Glenlivet set the standard in quality and taste that went on to define the Speyside style of whisky.

The result is an exceptionally well-balanced and smooth single malt. To the nose there are delicate aromas of citrus fruit, and the palate is sweet, with notes of oranges and pears, and hints of toffee apples and candy. The long, creamy, smooth finish makes this a deliciously satisfying dram. Makes for the perfect little gift.

name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description: With its intricate aromas and flavours, The Dalmore 12 is recognised as a whisky with character far beyond its age. Under the watchful eye of our Master Distiller, the spirit is initially matured in American white oak ex-bourbon casks. This gives its first base of soft vanilla and honey notes. A proportion of the spirit is then lovingly transferred into the finest sherry casks some of which have previously held rare and aged oloroso sherry. These are exclusively sourced from the world's finest bodegas, including Gonzalez Byass. These personally curated sherry casks gift the whisky its rich nutty character. The two styles are then reunited to createsomething magical.

name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description:
The original expression of our elegant, floral spirit and the real backbone of the Glenmorangie range. A ten-year-old single malt, Glenmorangie Original is produced by marrying the delicate spirit that emerges from Scotland's tallest stills, with first and second fill American white oak ex bourbon casks. Perfect for enjoying at any time or occasion -  whether savouring it neat, on ice or in a cocktail.

Award winning: -
  New York World Spirit Competition 2023 - Double Gold Medal
  International Whisky Competition 2023 - Best Single Malt Scotch 3rd Place - 88.75 pts
  San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2023 - Double Gold Medal
  • The original Expression of Glenmorangie

name: 15yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description:
Made with spring water so pure its stream was unlawfully diverted on a number of occasions, Dufftown's signature smooth whiskies are achieved by a secret combination ofboth American and European oak casks. Our 15 YO was matured in both American and European oak casks, producing an easy to enjoy whisky with a honey aromas, fresh fruit notes and a dry finish. This whisky is reassuringly well-balanced for a 15 year old, this is an elegant malt with sweet fruitiness and perfect finish.
  • A deeply delectable 15 Year Old from both refill ex-Bourbon casks, known for imparting a kiss of sumptuous vanilla, and Pedro Ximenez Oloroso seasoned casks, which infuse some fruity vibrancy into the spirit.

  • 2015 Silver Medal Winner at the International Wine and Spirits Competition

  • Fruity decadence. Zesty coriander, zingy pepper, decadent honey and creamy toffee.

  • Enjoy neat, with a drop of water or over ice

  • Celebrate in style and raise a glass of fruity decadence.

  • Its smooth flavour makes it the perfect gift for new single malt whisky drinkers..

name: Sherry Cask Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
description: TAMNAVULIN SHERRY CASK SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Matured in American White Oak Barrels and finessed by three different types of sherry cask with signature notes of raisin, vanilla and orange. A perfect complement to the sweet, mellow and smooth taste of Tamnavulin.

Amber gold in colour, this aromatic Speyside single malt offers enticing aromas of caramel, banana and milk chocolate with a hint of fresh ginger. Warm maple syrup with subtle notes of apricot and melon on the palate.

name: 16yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description:
Lagavulin is one of the smokiest and most intense whiskies in the world. Since 1816. Lagavulin Single Malt Scotch Whisky has been made in a picturesque huddle of buildings on Lagavulin Bay looking onto Dunyvaig castle. Revered by connoisseurs and experts, Lagavulin is known as the King of Islay. It is an 'essential' Scotch Whisky that any connoisseur or enthusiast must have in their collection; one of the world's favourite Malt Whiskies. On the nose, this full-bodied Single Malt has intensely flavoured, peat smoke with iodine and seaweed and a rich, deep sweetness. The palate is filled with dry peat smoke, presenting a gentle but strong sweetness, followed by sea and salt with touches of wood. Its finish is long, elegant and peat-filled with lots of salt and seaweed. A much sought-after Single Malt with massive peat-smoke that's typical of southern Islay - but also offering richness and a dryness that turns it into a truly interesting dram. The 16 Year Old has become a benchmark Islay dram from the Lagavulin distillery. Best enjoyed from a traditional whisky glass, neat or with a little still water. A gift for all occasions for lovers of peaty and powerful whiskies.
  • Lagavulin 16 Year Old has always been considered the epitome of Islay Single Malts. The King of Islay has celebrated numerous award wins, most recently winning Double Gold at the 2023 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

  • Lagavulin 16 Year Old is crafted by the people of Islay, with one of the longest distillation and maturation periods if something's worth doing, it's worth doing it right. Time, say the islanders, takes out the fire but leaves the warmth.

  • Intense, peat-rich, sweet and salty Single Malt Scotch Whisky from the coast of Islay.

  • Lagavulin 16 Year Old is the pride of more than two centuries' commitment, crafting a legendary, smoky Single Malt Whisky that is the hallmark of the classic Lagavulin distillery.

  • Best served neat, on ice or in a classic whisky cocktail.

  • Raise a glass of Lagavulin 16 Year Old with friends and loved ones..

  • The perfect gift for everyone from whisky enthusiasts to whisky connoisseurs..

name: Symphony No.1 Australian Malt Whisky 500ml
description: LARK SYMPHONY NO.1 AUSTRALIAN MALT WHISKY 500ML:EA
long_description:
Crowned The Category winner for the 2022 and 2023 World Whiskies Awards Best Blended Malt - Also taking home the Gold for Best Blended Malt.

Symphony N1 is the first blended malt from the House of Lark, representing a composition of exceptional Tasmanian single malt whiskies.

Crafted from a symphony of complementary casks, Head Distiller Chris Thomson has expertly woven the complexity of American oak bourbon with the balance of sherry and heavier depth of port to form a creamy, oily melody of flavours; a malt whisky that's full of life from start to finish and carries the un-compromised signature of Lark Whisky-a Tasmanian icon.

Inspired by the teachings of the Godfather of Australian Whisky, our Head Distiller, Chris, has been distilling at Lark since 2007.

When I go to a bar, I like to order several single malts and an empty glass. And I blend whiskies from all these different distilleries right there at the table. It feels like I'm painting a picture with a palette of different colours.

We've been talking about creating a blended malt here at Lark for a very long time. As far as I'm concerned, we're amongst the few in Australia who can pull it off. We began our journey by looking through our portfolios, and were pleased to find that our Bothwell distillery was producing a whisky with some incredible pineapple and tropical notes - that's really rare. We added a little bit of sherry cask for sweetness, and fortified for depth. There are notes of other whisky genres in there, too, like bourbon and rye. I wanted to create something that would feel relatable. Something that would feel like 'home' to anyone who'd experienced it.

name: Distillers Reserve Japanese Whisky 700ml
long_description:
Known as “the pioneer of Japanese whisky” Yamazaki is Japan's first and oldest distillery. Established in 1923
on the periphery of Kyoto, in a unique, misty region water and mountains offer diversity in nature and temperature,
where conditions are ideal for ageing whisky lies the birthplace of Japanese whisky and Suntory's flagship single malt, Yamazaki. Yamazaki Distiller's Reserve is
the introduction to the brand. Respecting
Yamazaki's heritage and signature taste, we combine aged Yamazaki sherry cask and aged mizunara cask malt whiskies to create Distiller's Reserve, a rich, easyto-
drink whisky with a round-bodied, profound and mature taste that is always luxurious, exclusive, knowledgeable, but
never pretentious.

name: Distillers Reserve Single Malt Japanese Whisky 700ml
description: HAKUSHU DISTILLERS RESERVE SINGLE MALT JAPANESE WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Known as “the fresh Japanese whisky”, Hakushu is an herbal and gently smoky single malt from Suntory's Mt Kaikomagatake distillery. Thanks to a mountain microclimate of luxurious forests and water filtrated by rain and snow through ages-old granite rock, malt whiskies born here are blessed a rare softness and purity. Hakushu
Distiller's Reserve is the introduction to the brand. Respecting Hakushu's heritage and signature taste, we
combine our lightly peated malt whiskies with aged American white oak cask malt whiskies to enhance Hakushu's
refreshing, crisp characteristics. Hakushu Distiller's Reserve is a whisky that is smooth in its complex nuances
and as vibrant as a fresh green leaf.

name: Single Malt Whisky 700ml
long_description: The natural sweetness of these casks complements the savoury charisma of the spirit, revealing fresh herbs, shortbread biscuits, raisins, toffee and dark chocolate on the nose. Meanwhile, the palate is luscious with well-integrated flavours of sticky date pudding and amaretto with a final note of espresso.

name: Irish Whiskey Liqueur 700ml
long_description:
During barrel aging a drop of whiskey is lost to evaporation and is sacrificed to the heavens, often referred to as the Angles Share Three Angles Irish Whiskey uses a unique Holy Trinity blend of Grain, Pot and Malt Irish Whiskey to deliver a silky smooth taste.

A sweet & spicy blend which leads with notes of cinnamon and is followed through with notes of ginger and chilli to finish.

name: Single Grain Japanese Whiskey 700ml
long_description:
This is a whisky that is made at one single distillery (Fuji distillery) in Japan using corn, rye and barley. Fuji Single Grain Whiskey is comprised of three whiskies of differing weights:
Light grain whisky - Scotch style (10% of blend): corn & malted barley
Medium grain whisky - Canadian style (60% of blend): corn & malted barley
Heavy grain whiskey - Bourbon style (30% of blend): corn, rye & malted barley

It is non-chill filtered and bottled at 46% ABV. The barrels used are 100% American white oak; a combination first fill and refill.

NOSE: Aromas of poached pear, rustic fruit tart, Cognac and marron glace.
PALATE: Smooth mouthfeel with multi-layered flavours of poached pear, orange marmalade, raspberry jam, rye spice, and bitter chocolate. Water brings out red berries and a delicate spiciness reminiscent of rye bread and cinnamon.
FINISH: Mellow with gentle sweetness and pleasant spiciness, smooth with a medium length finish and a hint of exotic incense.
